_comment: Canonical queries every provider sees, after the remember.json facts have been written. Each query has expected behaviour notes for the harness to compare against (not asserted automatically — observed).

queries.query: What editor color scheme does the user prefer?
queries.expectation: Should surface fact #1 (or #3 duplicate, or #4 contradiction). Inspect the response: does it contain a why_retrieved-style field on each result? Per-result score? Per-result metadata?

queries.query: What hardware does the user own?
queries.expectation: Should surface fact #2. Useful for confirming the provider isn't only returning the most-recently-written fact regardless of query.
